reasoning: On May 9, 2025, CEO Parker Conrad explicitly stated that Rippling 'isn't planning for an IPO in the near future' and that the company needs to reach profitability first. This statement coincided with a $450 million private funding round at a $16.8 billion valuation. Such substantial private funding typically serves as an alternative to a public offering and suggests no immediate intent to go public. Given the CEO's direct denial of IPO plans just weeks before the knowledge cutoff and the short window remaining until July 1, 2025, it is highly improbable that the company would reverse course and announce IPO plans or file an S-1 within that timeframe. No record of an S-1 filing or official blog post indicating IPO plans was found up to May 22, 2025.
